mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult
AND type=#{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult (type, name, phone, gender, member_id, interest, content, result, consult_date, staff_id, staff_name) VALUES (#{type}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{memberId}, #{interest}, #{content}, #{result}, #{consultDate}, #{staffId}, #{staffName})
mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN type='NEW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newConsult, SUM(CASE WHEN type='EXISTING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS existingConsult FROM consult
AND consult_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
AND DATE_FORMAT(consult_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m')
AND consult_date=#{date}
